name: Nx Build System Credential Stealer (UNC6426)
description: Compromised Nx packages run postinstall scripts that scan for credentials, abuse local AI tools, and upload stolen data. UNC6426 used stolen keys to gain AWS admin access within 72 hours.

affected_packages.name: nx
affected_packages.note: Stolen via GitHub Actions injection vulnerability. 4-hour attack window.

c2_servers.note: Exfiltrates to attacker-controlled public GitHub repositories

remediation: Upgrade to safe nx versions (21.9.0+ or 20.8.0)
Rotate ALL credentials: GitHub PATs, npm tokens, SSH keys, AWS credentials
Rotate any API keys found in home directory or environment variables
Audit AWS CloudTrail for unauthorized role creation (UNC6426 creates admin roles via OIDC)
Check GitHub account for unrecognized public repositories
Audit CI/CD pipelines that ran during the 4-hour attack window
